sample_commands.name: adhd-evening-reflect.md
sample_commands.savage_judgment: This isn't a command, it's a small novel about evening reflection. Has more variables than a statistics textbook.
sample_commands.improvement_potential: Split into 5 focused commands, 80% reduction needed

sample_commands.name: git-backup-sync.md
claude_md_violations: More thinking blocks than actual git commands
Error recovery more complex than most distributed systems
sample_commands.savage_judgment: 530 lines for git backup? Enterprise middleware has less complexity. This is automation theater, not intelligent automation.
sample_commands.improvement_potential: Remove 90% of complexity, use standard git commands

sample_commands.name: context-enhanced-executor.md
sample_commands.savage_judgment: Reasonably sized but still violates complexity rules. Adding complexity to prevent complexity - meta-fail.
sample_commands.improvement_potential: Remove priority levels, direct documentation loading

sample_commands.name: generate-thinking-command.md
claude_md_violations: Enforces thinking patterns instead of simplicity
sample_commands.savage_judgment: Meta-complexity at its worst. Creating commands that violate the same rules they're supposed to enforce.
sample_commands.improvement_potential: Focus on simple command templates, remove thinking enforcement

sample_commands.name: safe-code-beautifier.md
claude_md_violations: More complex than the code it beautifies
sample_commands.savage_judgment: The beautifier needs beautifying. 426 lines to make code prettier? When your tool is more complex than your problem, YOU are the problem.
sample_commands.improvement_potential: Use standard formatters, remove 90% of thinking overhead

immediate_actions: Break up mega-commands into focused units

specific_fixes.adhd-evening-reflect.md: Split into 5 separate commands, remove 80% of content
specific_fixes.git-backup-sync.md: Remove 90% of complexity, use standard git commands
specific_fixes.context-enhanced-executor.md: Remove priority levels, direct loading only
specific_fixes.generate-thinking-command.md: Simple templates only, remove thinking enforcement
specific_fixes.safe-code-beautifier.md: Use standard formatters, remove multi-phase complexity

final_verdict.savage_summary: Every single command violates CLAUDE.md complexity rules. These aren't intelligent commands, they're complexity disasters masquerading as productivity tools. The cure has become worse than the disease.
